versions.version_description: Simplified version and meant for acoustic performances - other chord charts had many notes over words making hard for beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
You're on the couch, blowing up my phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You don't want to come out, but you don't want to be alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
It don't take but two to have a little soirée[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
You're in the mood to sit tight right where you are, babe[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Cause I'll be at your door in ten minutes[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
Whatever you got on, girl, stay in it[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
You ain't gotta leave the house to have a good time[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'm a bring the good time home to you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
We'll have a house party, we don't need nobody[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Turn your TV off, break that boom-box out[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
We'll wake up all the neighbors til the whole block hates us[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
And the cops show up and try to shut us down[/tab]

[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
If you're gonna be a homebody[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
We're gonna have a house party[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
If you're gonna be a homebody[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
We're gonna have a house party[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
Throw a neon tee shirt over the lamp shade[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I'll take the furniture, slide it out of the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Shaking the floor, rattling the roof[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
We'll go to town like they're in your living-room[/tab]
